items.name: Far Cry® 3
items.description: Discover the dark secrets of a lawless island ruled by violence and take the fight to the enemy as you try to escape.

items.name: Far Cry® 4
items.description: Hidden in the towering Himalayas lies Kyrat, a country steeped in tradition and violence. You are Ajay Ghale.

items.name: Far Cry® Primal
items.description: A coming of age story that sets the protagonist and his friends on a journey kickstarted by a chain of serial murders.

items.name: Far Cry® New Dawn
items.description: ดำดิ่งสู่เมือง Hope County ในรัฐมอนทานาอันมีชีวิตชีวาที่เปลี่ยนแปลงไปหลังหายนะ 17 ปีหลังเกิดภัยพิบัตินิวเคลียร์ไปทั่วโลก

items.name: Bounty Brawl
items.description: Hunt your most wanted targets through the eye-catching nostalgic worlds.

items.name: Persona 4 Golden
items.description: A coming of age story that sets the protagonist and his friends on a journey kickstarted by a chain of serial murders.

items.name: CODE VEIN
items.description: In the face of certain death, we rise. Team up and embark on a journey to the ends of hell to unlock your past and escape your living nightmare in CODE VEIN.

items.name: Red Dead Redemption 2
items.description: RDR2 is the epic tale of outlaw Arthur Morgan and the infamous Van der Linde gang.

items.name: Assassin's Creed® IV Black Flag™
items.description: The year is 1715. Pirates rule the Caribbean and have established their own lawless Republic where corruption, greediness and cruelty are commonplace.

items.name: Samurai Vandalism
items.description: Mukuro is a member of the shogunate's personal enforcer group Hozuki.

items.name: Surviving Mars
items.description: There will be challenges to overcome. Execute your strategy and improve your colony’s chances of survival.

items.name: Subnautica: Below Zero
items.description: Dive into a freezing underwater adventure on an alien planet. Below Zero is set two years after the original Subnautica.

items.name: Steins;Gate
items.description: It is a gripping and moving Visual Novel, which has already spawned manga.

items.name: Hatred
items.description: Hatred is a violent twin-stick shooter, in which you take the role of The Antagonist fighting against all of humanity.

items.name: Ancestors Legacy
items.description: Ancestors Legacy is a squad-based real time strategy with a strong focus on tactics.

items.name: Remnant: From the Ashes
items.description: The world has been thrown into chaos by an ancient evil from another dimension.
